title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer’s payment failed during checkout process. They tried again but the transaction still did not complete.

title: Account Login Issue
description: Customer cannot log into their account dashboard. They reset the password but access is still denied.

title: Order Not Delivered
description: Customer’s order was marked as delivered. They checked everywhere but the package was not received.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer returned the purchased item recently. They expected a refund but no payment has been credited.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: Customer receives an error while uploading profile picture. They retried multiple times but it still fails.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: Customer attempted to cancel their subscription plan. They submitted the request but charges continue monthly.

title: Incorrect Product Received
description: Customer received a different product than ordered. They verified the invoice but item mismatch remains.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Customer’s mobile app crashes on startup. They reinstalled the app but issue still persists.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving confirmation emails. They checked spam folder but no messages appear.
